name: Cheese Bread
directions: Have ingredients at room temperature, beat slowly in mixer until well blended and fluffy.
Spread on sourdough french bread and toast under broiler until just bubbly.

name: Cheesy Bread Round
directions: Slice bread from the top lengthwise and crosswise, stopping about 1/2 inch from the bottom, so you end up with a checkered loaf (there will be~1/2- 1 inch square"towers" of bread).
Insert cheese slices in between bread sections- this is where you get creative-- cut the cheese slices to fit so there is a bit of cheese in every open section of bread.
Mix the onions, garlic powder, and butter together- brush over the top of the loaf, drizzling between the bread sections as well.
Wrap loaf in foil, and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Remove from oven, and remove foil from the top of the loaf, but keep wrapped around the sides.
Return to the oven and bake uncovered for another 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese has melted.
To serve, place the whole loaf on a plate, and your guests can grab a fork and dive in!

name: Quick Garlic Bread!
directions: take the slice of bread and toast it in your toaster to a nice golden brown colour.
once cooled apply butter to it and then apply the garlic paste.
now put on the cheese slice and sprinkle the oregano leaves on it.
now microwave this until the cheese bubbles, top with chilli sauce and enjoy.

name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
directions: Mix first seven ingredients together.
Place bread slices on ungreased cookie sheet.
Top each slice with cheese mixture.
Bake or broil until cheese is melted and lightly browned.

similar.name: Garlic Bread With Garlic & Herb Cheese

name: Extra Cheesy Garlic Bread
directions: Preheat oven to broil.
In a large bowl combine cheeses, mayonnaise, and garlic powder.
Spread mixture on both sides of bread and broil for a few minutes until cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Slice and serve immediately.
*Feel free to add any extras to this like herbs or spices, tomatoes, pesto -- *.
Enjoy!

name: Roasted Garlic Parmesan Bread
directions: Wrap each head of garlic in aluminum foil with a pat of butter.
Bake garlic for 40 minutes at 350.
Remove garlic from oven, cool, then peel each clove.
Put all garlic through a press.
Cut the french bread in half lengthwise.  Spread with butter.
Spread garlic paste over bread.
Sprinkle parmesan over garlic.
Broil for 5-10 minutes till edges brown.
Cut bread into 2" slices.

similar.name: Garlic Bread With Garlic & Herb Cheese

name: Parmesan Garlic Bread
directions: Spread butter on the two halves of bread and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Sprinkle cheeses on top and sprinkle with parsley flakes.
Place on baking sheet and bake 10 minutes in a 400 degree oven until cheese melts.  Cut into pieces with sharp knife.
Enjoy this wonderful cheesy bread!

name: Cheddar Parmesan Cheesy Garlic Bread
directions: Combine, all ingredients in a bowl. Sliced french bread in half. Spread topping on french bread. Place on baking sheet. Broil 5 1/2 inches from heat. Until slightly browned. Serve warm.

name: Cheesy Garlic Bread for 2
directions: Melt butter with garlic in microwave (about 20-40 seconds, depending on your microwave.).
Mix well.
Pour mixture over each half of sub roll.

Top with cheddar cheese (I use the block cheddar cheese and slice it into 4 skinny slices, put 2 of each slices on the bread --  or you can use pre-sliced cheese, one big piece for each half of the roll.).
Broil for 2-4 minutes until edges are brown and cheese is bubbly.
Top with black pepper.
Enjoy with pasta, meat, or even as a snack.

similar.name: Garlic Bread With Garlic & Herb Cheese

name: Garlic Bread With Garlic & Herb Cheese
directions: Preheat oven on Broil setting.
Spread Alouette Garlic & Herbs Spreadable Cheese on slices of French bread.
Sprinkle with parsley and parmesan cheese.
Place on baking sheet and broil until cheese melts.
Cut into portions and serve.

name: Cheese and Mayo Breadtwists
directions: Spray counter lightly with non-stick cooking spray. Roll each roll into a 12 to 14-inch rope. Fold in half and twist together. Mix together remaining ingredients. Brush top and sides of each twist liberally with mixture. Place twists on a large sprayed baking sheet. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise until double. Remove wrap and bake at 375°F 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.

name: Garlic Cheese Bread
directions: put butter on slices of bread.
sprinkle salt on bread.
put grated cheese on top of bread.
put bread on cookie sheet.
put in oven on med heat.
